Supermarket Simulator

Build your retail empire from a small corner store to a mega supermarket chain. Stock shelves, manage staff, set prices, and satisfy every customer.

Game Features

Everything you need to run the ultimate supermarket empire

Stock Management

Order products, manage inventory, and keep shelves full. Balance supply and demand to maximize profits.

Dynamic Pricing

Set competitive prices, run promotions, and watch your revenue grow. React to market trends in real-time.

Staff Management

Hire cashiers, stockers, and security. Train your team and keep morale high for better performance.

Customer Satisfaction

Happy customers spend more. Keep lines short, shelves stocked, and the store clean to earn loyalty.

Store Expansion

Start small and grow big. Unlock new departments, bigger spaces, and premium locations.

Realistic Economy

Experience a living economy with seasonal demand, supplier negotiations, and competitor pressure.

How to Play

Get started in minutes and build your supermarket dynasty

01

Open Your Store

Choose your starting location and layout. Every decision shapes your supermarket's future.

02

Stock & Sell

Order products from suppliers, place them on shelves, and watch customers fill their carts.

03

Expand & Dominate

Reinvest profits to unlock new departments, hire more staff, and become the top supermarket chain.

Ready to Run Your Supermarket?

Join millions of players and experience the most realistic supermarket management simulation game available.

Play Supermarket Simulator Now

Free to play • No download required • Browser-based

Pro Tips

Master the game with these expert strategies

Prioritize High-Margin Items

Focus on products with the best profit margins. Electronics and specialty foods often yield higher returns than basic groceries.

Keep Checkout Lines Moving

Long lines drive customers away. Hire enough cashiers and consider self-checkout stations to reduce wait times.

Monitor Peak Hours

Staff up during rush hours (mornings and evenings). Understaffing during busy periods costs you sales and reputation.

Run Strategic Promotions

Use loss leaders to draw customers in, then upsell high-margin items. Time promotions around holidays for maximum impact.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Supermarket Simulator free to play?

Yes! Supermarket Simulator is completely free to play in your browser. No downloads or installations required.

Can I play on mobile devices?

Absolutely. The game is optimized for both desktop and mobile browsers, so you can manage your store on the go.

How do I save my progress?

The game automatically saves your progress to your browser. For cross-device play, create a free account.

Are there multiplayer features?

Currently the game is single-player focused, with leaderboards where you can compete with friends for the highest store rating.

The ultimate store management simulation game. Play free in your browser.
